records.sprk_description: Initial case assessment and complaint drafting. Includes partner review of patent portfolio, prior art analysis, and preparation and filing of complaint in US District Court, Northern District of California.
Discovery planning and initial document collection. Includes Rule 26(f) conference preparation, discovery plan drafting, custodian interviews, and litigation hold implementation at Meridian Corp.

Document review and interrogatory preparation. Includes first-pass document review of 15,000 collected documents, preparation and service of interrogatories, and responses to defendant's initial discovery requests.

Expert witness engagement and deposition preparation. Includes retention of Dr. Patel and Dr. Nakamura, coordination of expert document review, and preparation of deposition outlines for key Pinnacle witnesses.
Continuing document review and holiday-reduced activity. Includes second-pass privilege review, preparation of privilege log, and initial analysis of defendant's document production.

Expert report preparation and motion drafting. Includes coordination with Dr. Patel on manufacturing process analysis report, initial drafting of summary judgment motion, and preparation for status conference.
Settlement discussions and status conference attendance. Includes preparation of settlement demand letter, attendance at court-ordered status conference, and preliminary trial scheduling discussions.

records.sprk_name: Dr. Robert Patel — Initial Expert Analysis
records.sprk_description: Initial manufacturing process analysis and preliminary report. Includes review of Meridian's patented thermal compression molding process, comparison with Pinnacle's TechFlex manufacturing methods, and preliminary opinion on infringement.

records.sprk_name: Dr. Patel & Dr. Nakamura — Supplemental Analysis
records.sprk_description: Dr. Patel supplemental manufacturing analysis addressing defendant's technical arguments. Dr. Nakamura initial patent claim construction review and prior art analysis for patent validity opinion.

records.sprk_name: Dr. Emily Nakamura — Patent Validity Opinion
records.sprk_description: Final patent validity opinion report. Includes comprehensive claim-by-claim analysis of Meridian's patent portfolio, assessment of prior art references cited by defendant, and opinion on patent enforceability.
